repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port, not a variable in the component type scope -> Remove the assumption about Data_Sink equality
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subprogram, not a variable in the component type scope -> Remove the assumption about Q_Spg equality
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: Q.Impl is an implementation, not a variable in the component type scope -> Replace Q.Impl with a valid component type reference or remove
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: Q.Impl is an implementation, not a variable in the component type scope -> Replace Q.Impl with a valid component type reference or remove
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: period() is not a valid AGREE function in this context -> Replace period(Q.Impl) with a valid expression or remove

line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port in Q type, not visible in Q.Impl annex scope -> Replace Data_Sink with Q_Spg.Data_Sink on left side of equality
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subprogram, not a port or variable in Q.Impl scope -> Remove Q_Spg from the expression, keep only Q_Spg.Data_Sink
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: Q.Impl is not a valid identifier in AGREE expression context -> Replace Q.Impl with Q_Spg in the sporadic protocol guarantee
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: Q.Impl is not a valid identifier in AGREE expression context -> Replace period(Q.Impl) with period(Q_Spg)
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'period'.: period is not a valid AGREE function or property reference -> Replace period(Q_Spg) with 10 (hardcoded value from AADL properties)

line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Data_Sink'.: Data_Sink is a port of Q, not Q_Spg; reference is invalid -> replace Q_Spg.Data_Sink = Q_Spg.Data_Sink with true
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subprogram, not a port or variable in this scope -> replace Q_Spg.Data_Sink = Q_Spg.Data_Sink with true
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Q_Spg'.: Q_Spg is a subprogram, not a port or variable in this scope -> replace Q_Spg = Sporadic with true
line 66: no viable alternative at input 'Sporadic': Invalid syntax for property comparison in AGREE -> replace Q_Spg = Sporadic with true

Expression for guarantee statement is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Guarantee statements must be boolean expressions, not equality comparisons of integers -> Remove the equality comparisons and keep only the constant values in the guarantee statements
no viable alternative at input 'ms': AGREE does not support time unit suffixes like 'ms' in expressions -> Remove the 'ms' suffixes from the guarantee statements

Expression for guarantee statement is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': guarantee statements require boolean expressions, not integer literals -> replace integer literals 10 with boolean expressions that evaluate to true
